summary: Intake -> spec frozen -> design-brief draft -> design-authority review (approved with 15 additions, non-JSON flag preservation decision) -> user approval -> 3 tasks compiled (task-001 CLI core, task-002 docs sweep, task-003 bundle+verify) -> user task list approval -> env setup (no deps). Ready to enter Building.
risk_notes: Windows fs.readFileSync(0) exception handling is a core acceptance criterion for task-001
Bundle regeneration miss is double-defended by task-003 eval_commands
integration.js ~17 sites rewrite is handled inside task-001
